basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Assistant Matron Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) Assistant Matron Notification 2026 has been released on 05 July 2026 on the official website cusat.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUSAT Assistant Matron Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 55 years

qualification.education_qualification: A Bachelors Degree from a recognized University
qualification.details: Assistant Matron: A Bachelors Degree from a recognized University.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on marks in qualifying degree
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUSAT Assistant Matron Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.cusat.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Matron Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CUSAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CUSAT Assistant Matron Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.cusat.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Matron Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Assistant Matron recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the CUSAT Assistant Matron recruitment is 05 August 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Assistant Matron post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Assistant Matron post is 30 years, and the maximum age limit is 55 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Matron position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Assistant Matron post, candidates must possess a Bachelors Degree from a recognized University. This is the primary educational requirement.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Matron post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Assistant Matron post in the Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the CUSAT Assistant Matron recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 950/-, while for SC/ST candidates, it is ₹ 195/-. This fee is payable as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Matron post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Assistant Matron post will receive a salary of ₹ 25,980/- per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Matron role at CUSAT?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Matron role at CUSAT primarily involves shortlisting candidates based on their marks obtained in the qualifying degree. Further stages may be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is the application process online or offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CUSAT Assistant Matron recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit the hard copy by the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT), which is www.cusat.ac.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Assistant Matron position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Matron position at CUSAT is a contract-based job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.
